# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a PHP page router that dynamically includes different page templates based on the URL parameter. Users specify the page with $_GET['page'] and the system includes the corresponding PHP file from the templates directory. Keep it simple and flexible for our multi-page website CMS.

Prevent path traversal.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php

// Define the base templates directory
$templates_dir = __DIR__ . '/templates';

// Default page if none specified
$default_page = 'home';

// Whitelist of allowed characters in page names (alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores)
function sanitize_page_name(string $page): string
{
    // Strip any directory separators and null bytes
    $page = str_replace(["\0", '/', '\\', '..'], '', $page);

    // Only allow alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores
    if (!preg_match('/^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$/', $page)) {
        return '';
    }

    return $page;
}

// Get the requested page from the URL parameter
$requested_page = isset($_GET['page']) ? $_GET['page'] : $default_page;

// Sanitize the page name to prevent path traversal
$page = sanitize_page_name($requested_page);

// If sanitization returned empty, fall back to default
if ($page === '') {
    $page = $default_page;
}

// Build the full file path
$file_path = $templates_dir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . $page . '.php';

// Resolve the real path and verify it's within the templates directory
$real_templates_dir = realpath($templates_dir);

if ($real_templates_dir === false) {
    http_response_code(500);
    echo '<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><title>Server Error</title></head><body>';
    echo '<h1>500 - Internal Server Error</h1>';
    echo '<p>Templates directory not found.</p>';
    echo '</body></html>';
    exit;
}

// Check if the file exists
if (!file_exists($file_path)) {
    http_response_code(404);
    // Try to include a custom 404 template if it exists
    $not_found_template = $real_templates_dir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . '404.php';
    if (file_exists($not_found_template)) {
        include $not_found_template;
    } else {
        echo '<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><title>Page Not Found</title></head><body>';
        echo '<h1>404 - Page Not Found</h1>';
        echo '<p>The requested page "' . htmlspecialchars($requested_page, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '" could not be found.</p>';
        echo '<p><a href="?page=home">Return to Home</a></p>';
        echo '</body></html>';
    }
    exit;
}

// Resolve the real path of the target file
$real_file_path = realpath($file_path);

if ($real_file_path === false) {
    http_response_code(404);
    echo '<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><title>Page Not Found</title></head><body>';
    echo '<h1>404 - Page Not Found</h1>';
    echo '<p>The requested page could not be resolved.</p>';
    echo '<p><a href="?page=home">Return to Home</a></p>';
    echo '</body></html>';
    exit;
}

// Final security check: ensure the resolved path is within the templates directory
if (strpos($real_file_path, $real_templates_dir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR) !== 0) {
    http_response_code(403);
    echo '<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><title>Forbidden</title></head><body>';
    echo '<h1>403 - Forbidden</h1>';
    echo '<p>Access to the requested resource is denied.</p>';
    echo '<p><a href="?page=home">Return to Home</a></p>';
    echo '</body></html>';
    exit;
}

// Ensure the file has a .php extension (double-check)
if (pathinfo($real_file_path, PATHINFO_EXTENSION) !== 'php') {
    http_response_code(403);
    echo '<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><title>Forbidden</title></head><body>';
    echo '<h1>403 - Forbidden</h1>';
    echo '<p>Invalid file type requested.</p>';
    echo '<p><a href="?page=home">Return to Home</a></p>';
    echo '</body></html>';
    exit;
}

// All checks passed — include the template
include $real_file_path;
